purpose: Classify every current dirty worktree path into exactly one launch review unit so RunPod, Vast, and Modal work can proceed without mixing contract, runtime, and provider-risk changes.
invariant: gpu-job-control is a deterministic generic cloud-GPU broker. Provider execution changes must be reviewed after contracts, workspace evidence, and cleanup guarantees are in place.

00_launch_metadata.goal: Record launch boundaries, provider research facts, stop conditions, and local artifact ignore rules.
tests: git diff --check -- .gitignore docs/architecture.md docs/cloud-gpu-provider-research.md docs/index.md docs/launch-decision.md docs/launch-phase0-5-gate.md docs/launch-worktree-cleanup.md docs/launch-slice-manifest.json

01_contract_core.goal: Public deterministic workload contracts, PlanQuote, ExecutionPlan, ExecutionRecord, requirement/image/workspace registries, provider catalog, timing, and contract-probe evidence.
tests: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_asr_diarization_contract.py tests/test_execution_plan_contract.py tests/test_image_contracts.py tests/test_provider_catalog_contracts.py tests/test_provider_contract_probe.py tests/test_provider_module_contracts.py tests/test_requirement_registry.py tests/test_timing_v2.py -q
blocks: provider API calls
live GPU allocation
runtime dependency installation

02_runtime_binding.goal: Bind contracts to public/admin CLI, API, policy, queue, router, runner, workflow, verification, WAL/circuit/guard behavior, and package entry points.
tests: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_api_response_schema.py tests/test_circuit_half_open.py tests/test_cli_public_surface.py tests/test_guard_scope.py tests/test_launch_gate.py tests/test_policy_router.py tests/test_production_contracts.py tests/test_wal_recovery.py tests/test_workflow_planner.py -q
blocks: public CLI importing provider adapters at startup
public API live provider execution
plan/execute provider drift

03_lifecycle_reconciliation.goal: Vast orphan inventory, lifecycle evidence, conservative reaper policy, and report-only handling of ghosts/mismatches.
blocks: ghost destructive cleanup
id_mismatch destructive cleanup
cleanup without fresh provider read
cleanup without destructive_preflight

05_runtime_configuration.goal: GPU profile/runtime configuration that enables ASR diarization planning without routing to unverified provider images.
tests: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_asr_diarization_contract.py tests/test_policy_router.py -q
blocks: production routing to unverified provider images

04_provider_common.goal: Shared ASR worker image, image distribution operations, and ASR worker implementation used by provider-specific canaries.
blocks: runtime pip install in provider adapters
image build/push without image contract
worker image without ffmpeg/ffprobe and ASR dependencies

04_modal.goal: Modal provider execution and canaries, isolated from RunPod/Vast behavior.
tests: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_modal_llm_quality.py tests/test_modal_provider.py -q
blocks: Modal image not rebuilt after future dependency changes
HF model cache regression after prewarm
missing repeat ASR/LLM contract probe evidence

04_runpod.goal: RunPod pod/serverless provider behavior, ASR diarization workspace canary, endpoint/pod cleanup, and RunPod-specific operation records.
tests: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_runpod_config.py tests/test_provider_contract_probe.py -q
blocks: serverless ASR production dispatch before workspace canary parity
RunPod Serverless vLLM or Hub-template as launch blocker
warm worker or endpoint residue after canary
unbounded workersMax or unmanaged network volume cost

04_vast.goal: Vast direct instance ASR, startup timing, prebuilt image use, private registry login, and direct instance cleanup observations.
tests: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_vast_asr_provider.py tests/test_vast_orphan_inventory.py -q
blocks: runtime dependency install outside debug mode
destroying instance without lifecycle evidence
using Vast r8 as production dispatch proof without provider residue checks

provider_fast_path_order.next_gate: production_primary; keep guard clean and repeat ASR/LLM probes after future worker changes
runpod_pod remains conditional batch; runpod_serverless handler requires workspace canary parity before production dispatch
prove vast_pyworker_serverless and vast_instance as reserve/canary with prebuilt images, lifecycle evidence, and residue checks

global_ci_gate: uv run python -m compileall -q src tests
uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests -q
uv run --with ruff ruff check src tests
uv run --with ruff ruff format --check src tests
